\tzpentry{ID5611}{Magnetization Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5611 introduces Magnetization Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \bm{M}(\bm{x})=M_0\,h(G)\,\hat{\bm{t}}_{\rm spiral}(\theta,\phi;\hat{\bm{n}}(t)), \end{equation}
